steps.title: Attach the opening description
steps.content: The opening phrase describes a literary work: a coming-of-age story, social meditation, and gaze into colonialism. The subject after that phrase must therefore be Chraïbi's novel, which can also perform the verb "interrogates."

steps.title: Avoid misplaced subjects
steps.content: Choice A makes Morocco follow the description, so the appositive illogically describes a country. Choice C makes Chraïbi the subject. Choice D places a publication modifier next to Chraïbi instead of the novel. The sentence needs the novel as the subject. The answer is B.
